description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Qodana that runs on workflow dispatch and push to the develop branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with write permissions to repository contents, pull requests, and checks. Check out the repository with full history and run a Qodana scan using the JetBrains/qodana-action with QODANA_TOKEN from secrets and QODANA_ENDPOINT set to https://qodana.cloud.
